title: November COLA Increase Coming Soon!
description: A reminder that the next cost-of-living adjustment (COLA) from our new contract takes effect this November. You should see this important increase reflected in your November paycheck.

title: Ice Cream Social Was Sweet!
description: Thank you to all the members, family, and friends who joined us for our Solidarity Ice Cream Party outside the Kerr Administration building!

title: COLA Increase Takes Effect
description: A reminder that the cost-of-living adjustment we won in our last contract takes effect this month. Check your pay stub!
